message:
Improve health package test coverage (73.9% -> 85.6%)

Added comprehensive tests for expiry parsing:
- parseClaudeCredentialsFile: valid credentials, missing oauth, access
  token only, empty oauth, invalid JSON, non-existent file
- getADCPath: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS, CLOUDSDK_CONFIG, default
- ParseAllExpiry: basic functionality
- NeedsRefresh: default threshold behavior
- ParseCodexExpiry: default path with CODEX_HOME
- ParseGeminiExpiry: default path with GEMINI_HOME
- ParseClaudeExpiry: credentials file, nested auth.json, no auth files
- parseADCFile: no refresh token, invalid JSON
- parseOAuthFile: expiresIn with camelCase
- parseExpiryField: additional date formats, milliseconds, unknown types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
